---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ForensicAI
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
What problem or limitation does this address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Describe the expected behavior.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🔬 Forensic Use Case
How does this feature help digital forensics workflows?

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from similar tools.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature request here.
